reviews.comment:
La atención de exelencia de esta YPF asociada al ACA,es su mayor distincion.
Instalaciones que claramente piden un renovación,se ve compensada con una atencion premiun,siempre con el mejor asesoramiento y la  buena onda de sus playeros.
La confitería cuenta con una buena carta ya sea para desayunar o almorzar.

(Translated by Google)
The excellent service at this YPF station, affiliated with the ACA, is its greatest distinguishing feature. While the facilities clearly need updating, this is more than compensated for by the premium service, always offering the best advice and the friendly atmosphere provided by the attendants. The café has a good menu, perfect for breakfast or lunch.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhN2JPaTRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Todo normal... El Full, no es Full Full.
A lo que me refiero, el servicompras está completó, la atención del personal es excelente....pero no se puede pagar con la app de YPF...

(Translated by Google)
Everything's normal... The Full isn't quite Full Full.

What I mean is, the convenience store is fully stocked, the staff is excellent... but you can't pay with the YPF app...

reviews.comment:
Martes 20 de Julio entre las 13 y 14 hs deje mi vehiculo estacionado en la zona del cafe/kiosco al lado de otros dos vehiculos por no más de 10 minutos. Al volver encuentro mi auto con númerosos carteles diciendo que no podia estacionar en ese lugar, los mismos estaban pegados con plasticola en los cristales lo cual me parecio violento y excesivo. Pedi hablar con Fabian que era el encargado del turno, no supo darme respuesta, el playero que colocó los carteles fue Claudio, cuando fui a hablar con él para recibir alguna explicación me dijo que estaba ocupado cerrando caja y que su turno habia finalizado.
Una vergüenza, alcanzaba con avisarme de mi falta al momento que volvi.

(Translated by Google)
On Tuesday, July 20th, between 1 and 2 PM, I parked my car in the cafe/kiosk area next to two other vehicles for no more than 10 minutes. When I returned, I found my car covered in signs saying I couldn't park there. They were glued to the windows, which I found offensive and excessive. I asked to speak with Fabian, who was in charge on the shift, but he couldn't give me an answer. The attendant who put up the signs was Claudio. When I went to speak with him to get an explanation, he told me he was busy closing the register and that his shift had ended.
It's shameful. It would have been enough to notify me of my violation when I returned.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhOElySmdBRRAB
